title: Company Formation
metaDescription: Company formation services in Vietnam — register an LLC, JSC, branch or representative office with up to 100% foreign ownership.

hero.title: Company Formation Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Setting up a business in Vietnam can be challenging, but it doesn't have to be.

sections.heading: We handle your entire company registration
body: InCorp Vietnam simplifies business establishment by handling the entire registration process — from representative office setup to complete company incorporation. We assist global companies from Asia Pacific, Europe and North America in navigating regulations and administrative requirements for legal, long-term success.
Your formation comes wrapped in a comprehensive market-entry package: legal consultation, HR support, taxation guidance and accounting assistance, all under one roof.

sections.heading: Choose the right company structure
sections.subtitle: Four common structures for foreign investors entering Vietnam.

items.title: Limited Liability Company (LLC)
items.desc: The most common type — a straightforward structure with quick setup and flexible capital requirements.

items.title: Joint-Stock Company (JSC)
items.desc: A shareholder-based entity with transferable shares, suited to larger ventures and capital raising.

items.title: Representative Office (RO)
items.desc: A non-profit, foreign-owned office for market research and hiring, with no capital requirement.

items.title: Branch Office (BO)
items.desc: Operates under the parent company's structure and can acquire permits for business activities.

sections.heading: How company registration works
sections.subtitle: A clear, guided path from first contact to operations.

items.title: Submit information & needs

sections.heading: Benefits of forming your company with us
items: Speed and efficiency in every process
International prestige through the InCorp Group network

items.q: Can foreigners establish companies in Vietnam?
items.a: Yes. Foreign investors can register companies — limited liability companies are the most common thanks to their straightforward structure and quick setup.
Four options: LLC, JSC, Branch Office and Representative Office.
Vietnamese law specifies no general minimum, though USD 25,000-30,000 is typically advised for smooth operations.

items.q: Can foreigners own 100% of the company?
items.a: Yes, in most sectors — with exceptions in restricted areas such as narcotics, hazardous chemicals, endangered species, prostitution and human trafficking.
LLC or JSC formation typically takes 40-60 days, though purchasing a shelf company can accelerate this to a few working days.

items.q: Are there alternatives without full incorporation?
items.a: Yes — HR outsourcing as Employer of Record and local distributor partnerships are viable options.

sections.title: Start your company in Vietnam today
sections.subtitle: Our experts will guide you from structure selection to first day of operations.
